milestones.name: Mobile Layout Button Verification
milestones.description: Tested all interactive buttons on the phone (mobile viewport 390x800) including the swap button, search main button, location autocomplete suggestions, tabs switching, and browser navigation routing.

milestones.name: Polissages Visuels Mobiles
milestones.description: Ensured that location selections fit perfectly on two lines with uppercase format using numberOfLines={1} and small compact fonts (14px & 10px) preventing line breaks.

milestones.name: Mappage GPS Ratsimandrava & Repères Généraux
milestones.description: Fixed current location mapping for Toby Ratsimandrava to correctly resolve to 'Ouest Ambohijanahary IIIG/IIIM (Antananarivo IV)'. Also generalized the GPS mapping system for all Madagascar users by adding directional translations (Andrefana -> Ouest) and enriching the location database with major landmark entries (Analakely, Soarano, 67ha, Ankatso, Ankorondrano, Anosibe, Ratsimandrava).

milestones.name: Charte Responsive Ordinateur / Téléphone Scellée
milestones.description: Enforced a strict dual-viewport design rule at the top of README.md, nos_idees.md, and audit.md, mandating that every subsequent layout update must be validated and polished for both Desktop and Mobile views.

milestones.name: Validation Documentation
milestones.description: Updated README.md, nos_idees.md, and audit.md to reflect successful phone button testing and full stability.

next_steps: Verify secondary actions on passenger detailed views.
Refine loading indicators for low-network cellular users.
